3. **Atom index 19** - Element: **H** (Hydrogen)

**geomconf_index:** 7611

The carbon atom at index 12 is part of an aromatic ring structure and has three covalent bonds: two to adjacent carbon atoms in the ring (indices 11 and 13) and one to a hydrogen atom (index 19).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 12 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
